items.translated_title: US orders travelers on Air Force One to throw away gifts, pins, and burner phones after China trip

images.alt: Apple CEO Tim Cook attends a state banquet hosted by Chinese President Xi Jinping at the Great Hall of the People on May 14, 2026 in Beijing, China. Both President Trump and President Xi addressed ways to enhance bilateral economic cooperation and investment, and agreed that Iran should not be allowed to have a nuclear weapon. According to Chinese state media, Xi emphasized the importance of the Taiwan issue, and that a mishandling could sour U.S.-China relations.

items.content: While the summit appeared cordial, China remains a key adversary of the United States, given its advanced intelligence and espionage capabilities.
